use_cases: Displaying featured products with call-to-action in e-commerce storefronts
Showcasing digital products or SaaS offerings with pricing information
Presenting product details with image, title, description, and purchase button
ai_summary: A product card component designed for e-commerce and SaaS platforms, featuring product image display, title, description, and a call-to-action button. Built with Radix UI Slot and CVA for flexible variant styling. Supports hover interactions and integrates cleanly into product grids or featured sections.
